nodes.name: Enrichment Trigger
nodes.notes: Called by main workflow (passthrough mode: receives the item built by 'Build Enrich Input' = {case_id,indicator,indicator_type,source_ip})

nodes.name: Build Targets
nodes.notes: Expand indicator + public source_ip into provider work items

nodes.name: Has Targets?
nodes.notes: True = real target → cache/providers; False = sentinel → straight to Aggregate

nodes.name: Cache Get
nodes.notes: Look up per-provider cached verdict; empty if miss or sentinel

nodes.name: Cache Hit?
nodes.notes: True = cached verdict present; False = needs live provider call

nodes.name: Decode Cache Hit
nodes.notes: Cache hit → parse stored result JSON back to {provider,ok,data}

nodes.name: AbuseIPDB
nodes.notes: IP reputation; failure → continue with empty body

nodes.name: Shodan
nodes.notes: Host context; 404 = no info (treated as clean), not failure

nodes.name: OTX
nodes.notes: OTX pulses for ip/domain/url/hash

nodes.name: Normalize Result
nodes.notes: Map raw provider responses into {provider, ok, data}

nodes.name: Only Cache OK
nodes.notes: Gate: only ok results get written to cache

nodes.name: Cache Set
nodes.notes: Cache only successful results (failed ones skipped before this node)

nodes.name: Aggregate Verdict
nodes.notes: One verdict per target with per-provider sources + summary

nodes.name: Build IRIS Payloads
nodes.notes: Compose IRIS note markdown + IOC payloads from verdicts

nodes.name: Post Note
nodes.notes: Post enrichment note to the IRIS case (best-effort)

nodes.name: Split IOCs

parameters.jsCode:
const j = $input.first().json;
return (j.iocs || []).map(ioc => ({ json: { case_id: j.case_id, ...ioc } }));

nodes.notes: Emit one item per IOC for the IOC POST node

nodes.name: Register IOC

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ioc_type_id: $json.ioc_type_id, ioc_value: $json.ioc_value, ioc_description: $json.ioc_description, ioc_tags: $json.ioc_tags, ioc_tlp_id: $json.ioc_tlp_id }) }}

nodes.notes: Register each target as an IOC on the case (best-effort)

nodes.name: Ensure Note Directory
nodes.notes: IRIS v2.4.0+ notes require a directory; create one and capture data.id for Post Note

nodes.name: Filter AbuseIPDB
nodes.notes: Pass only abuseipdb work items to the AbuseIPDB HTTP node

nodes.name: Filter Shodan
nodes.notes: Pass only shodan work items to the Shodan HTTP node

nodes.name: Filter OTX
nodes.notes: Pass only otx work items to the OTX HTTP node
